review_title: Are you a coach? With RankingCoach you can reach your customers. Your ONLINE Marketing
author: Cristina Marcano L.
pros: When it comes to positioning on the web you have to think about RankingCoach. It allows you to generate traffic on your website becoming your best ally to reach your customers. What I like the most is that as a Marketing tool you can control and measure your reach because it generates daily information on the ranking of your search keywords and if you associate it with Google Analytics you know exactly which keywords are used for your search in the net.
cons: It is an easy to use System and the truth seems great. For me there are no cons with regard to this system.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: After doing the basic recommendations, there is a little more to do with the tool. They say they can subscribe us to many directory sites and update our data there, but only do it on very few (-15 sites). They are extremely hard to allow us to cancel.
author: Francisco Manuel M.
pros: Easy to use tool, the recommendations are very specific, they have a few features we cannot find on other similar tools...
cons: We have a few problems doing the set up of social media accounts. Then their technical support want us to change things on the social sites, when the thing we need was to change values on RankingCoach! Now the "solutions" works on 50/50 basis...
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: RUN RUN RUN they will steal you money and leave you without help
author: Tammy G.
pros: SCAM ALERT..... RUNNNNNNN From this system. It appeared like it would be a great system to help me with errors so I paid for the year. Once I paid I found once the first few issues were corrected then it showed nothing that was helpful to fix. I kept waiting to see if it would get better but it didn't. I canceled and ask for a refund for future months that had not been use. They REFUSED to refund for future months. They said it didn't matter if I liked their service or not they would not refund even though it is for months that I haven't received service for. This makes them a thief and a scammer.
cons: Bate and switch. They appear to be good but then their service doesn't do any real help. DONT trust what you first see. Once you pay the help stops
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience was good to discover some things. But I stopped using it because it does not work for the blog option.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most is that step by step tells you what you should do to improve the SEO of your website.
cons: What I like the least is that it lacks the option of Blogs. That is, you can only work with websites. Then the functions are limited.
author_profession: Dog blogger en La vida con Pancho
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Worthless Product and Terrible Customer Service
description: They definitely put more effort into stealing your money than they do their product. Stay far away. I’m assuming any positive reviews must be fake and created by them. Originally purchased for SEO services, the product did nothing beyond what I could manage on my own, doing my own research. It honestly feels like a scam. They make it impossible to cancel. I first tried the product in 2022, thought I canceled after the trial, but apparently not. Ended up paying $480 for it, fine. I figured it HAD to be canceled now. But 2023 rolls around and I receive another annual charge. I apparently only canceled the “free” subscription which they list as a separate ACTIVE subscription. So when you “cancel your subscription” you’re only canceling a free version rather than the paid version which requires additional, much more discrete steps. Scam, right? Paid ANOTHER $480. Canceled AGAIN. 2024, I get charged again, even though the card they have on file for me is expired and doesn’t even have the same security code. I reach out to them and at first, they refuse to refund me, saying their policy requires you cancel a week in advance. Crazy considering they don’t send out any notification about the subscription renewal and also crazy considering I have been trying to cancel it for YEARS now. After some back and forth, they AGREE to refund me, tell me I will receive my refund with 7 days. 2 weeks pass by and I have not received a refund, so I reach out again and they tell me they will now only give me a refund minus a $60 fee. Clearly, they rely on businesses who don’t pay much attention to their spending accounts so that they can just conveniently forget refunds they agree to and do everything in their power possible not to give you money back while also not actually canceling subscriptions you’ve requested to cancel. You have to cancel your card in order to cancel this service.
author: Kristen W.
pros: Absolutely zero. Nothing. Not one thing.
cons: I have tried to cancel the membership on 3 different occasions and continue to be charged.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: I do not recommend this company. You should be very careful because this company offers a 3-day trial period and after 3 days the amount is debited from your account and there is no possibility of cancellation. I tried to cancel and get a refund and the response from this company was no. So I paid 480.- for a service that I do not want and do not use.
author: Telmo C.
pros: nothing. it's not what it really says it is
cons: It's not what it really says it is. a lot of confusion
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Keep an eye on your bank account
description: No prior notification that subscription was about to renew and no prior warning that the cost had gone up by 60%. Business relationship completely soured by a company eager to take your money for nothing. I was not going to renew this subscription. £360 to see where your keywords rank is quite a rip off
author: Julie H.
pros: Used to see where my keywords ranked amongst my competitors really
cons: The system is ok. Cant say that I overly used or that I used it to its full extent. More that it was easy to see where I stood amongst competitors. They liked to show me how my competitors were advertising on Google because of course, that would make me want to advertise on google through them, spending more money with them. But then they renewed my subscription to the tune of £360 and took this from my bank account without prior notification and authorisation. For a small business this is not good. They are attempting to use their fine print to convince me that I agreed to this extortionate amount being taken from my bank account. The system is simply not worth £360 a year. Be warned. Be aware. And keep your bank details safe. Relationship completely soured and I will likely take the legal route of getting my money back.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I bought the Rankingcoach service because I needed SEO software for my website. In the initial period, I was very happy and the results obtained coincided with the indications of other websites to which I had purchased access. However, after some time there was a failure of the system which showed an unusual action. I contacted the support department. I was informed that I must remove everything and start over. This involved redoing all the setting work. After some time, the system should be turned on and you will see a decrease in keyword ramkings. in one load it showed good and bad in another. The chart was showing up with the bad guys. This is a serious mistake because the user doesn't know if the rankings are true. This causes stress and a ton of additional checks on other sites. I contacted the support department, but the lady said she was going on vacation and that I should write in their language (sic!). I wrote but I didn't get any support within a month. Observing the data, it seems to me that they tried to do something about it, but it's still wrong. I wonder where their prizes and awards come from.
author: Mariusz O.
pros: In the initial period, I was very satisfied and the results obtained were consistent with the indications of other websites to which I had purchased access. Simple and clear interface. Clear hints and an easy system for entering and tracking keywords made me adapt quickly.
cons: Unfortunately, a faulty operation and lack of support (just pathetic support - see below) resulted in a decline in the rating of this product. Therefore, after the first good impression, I am three times disappointed. Errors and more errors. Zero support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I used RankingCoach for about 2 years, there software is better than nothing, and does help a little with seo rankings. But don't be fooled, these people are looking to pick your pocket & they are not located in the US, so you may have little recourse. They word their contracts to rip you off - BUYER BEWAREWhen my subscription ended they just charged my card for another full year about $399 plus $12 transaction fee, since I am going to let a professional manage my seo , I no longer needed to use Ranking Coach. The charge went thru on 12/6 , I emailed them 2 days later that I wanted to cancel & to please refund my fee. They refused saying you need to cance 7 days before your subscription ends !! Very bad business practice.I can see maybe charging me for a month, but a whole year !! & I was a customer !Please stay away from these foreign hustlers .I wish I never used them
author: James M.
pros: There SEO System is OK for people that can't afford to hire a professional
cons: Very poor customer service- super shady contract- make sure you read the fine print !! They will charge you for fees and will not refund you ! This has happened to multiple people, read the reviews ! I wish I did.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Rankingcoach has taken money from me
description: I learned a bit more about SEO and how not to market an online subscription aplication
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nice idea if it worked. I think that this will perhaps teach novice SEO users some things about SEO and local SEO but an online course would be better value.
cons: Rankingcoach has taken money from me due to long contractual periods. The service does not work very well with reports not showing data correctly, emails sent to clients will come from a German URL confusing your clients. The information shown such as local SEO is easily disproved and they will sound like they care but do nothing. I am still paying them every month and I don't want the service. Please avoid at all cost.

review_title: Je suis titulaire de trois comptes sur le site rankingCoach
author: FABIEN L.
pros: Je tiens à préciser que je ne remets pas en question la qualité du logiciel rankingCoach, qui fonctionne très bien. Cependant, l'attitude et la gestion des tâches par cet employé spécifique sont source de préoccupation majeure.
cons: "Je suis titulaire de trois comptes sur le site rankingCoach. Récemment, j'ai rencontré un problème avec une promotion de Black Friday, qui a été appliquée au mauvais compte. J'ai contacté par écris le service client pour demander le transfert de l'offre sur le compte approprié, mais on m'a informé que ma requête ne pouvait pas être satisfaite. Peu après, j'ai demandé un remboursement, étant donné que l'achat datait de moins de 24 heures, mais cette demande a également été refusée. Cependant, lors d'un appel téléphonique ultérieur, le transfert de mon abonnement a été inopinément accordé. Malheureusement, ce transfert a été mal géré, entraînant la suppression de mon compte d'entreprise actif et la fusion de deux comptes distincts. Depuis cet incident, j'ai essayé à maintes reprises de contacter un responsable ou un autre membre du service client, sans obtenir de réponse. Cela fait presque 10 jours que je contact le service client en demandant à être rappeler par un responsable sans recevoir de rappelle, à l'exception de réponses du même interlocuteur, qui a commis toutes ces erreurs significatives. En outre, j'ai informé le service client qu'un de mes abonnements s'était renouvelé automatiquement, bien que je n'avais pas l'intention de le poursuivre. On m'a assuré que la facture serait annulée, mais rankingCoach continue d'essayer de débiter mon compte générant des frais bancaire, ce qui m'a contraint à faire opposition à ma carte bancaire. Je tiens à préciser que je ne remets pas en question la qualité du logiciel rankingCoach, qui fonctionne très bien. Cependant, l'attitude et la gestion des tâches par cet employé spécifique sont source de préoccupation majeure. Sans résolution satisfaisante d'ici le 5 décembre, je me verrai dans l'obligation de consulter mon avocat et de soumettre cette affaire à '60 millions de consommateurs', une organisation de défense des droits des consommateurs."
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Figure professionali specializzate nel marketing digitale
description: Strapositiva, specialmente grazie ad operatori come il dottor Ukandu, instancabili e ottimi consiglieri.
author: Sara L.
pros: L'onestà, la puntualità delle attese. Il fatto che mi hanno parlato chiaro subito che ci voleva un po' di tempo.
cons: È un programma completo. Sarebbe bello se pensassero loro anche agli ads sui principali social. Ovviamente non da fare tutto tutti, ma sarebbe utile.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: me dio muy buenos resultados lo recomiendo
author: kelis Y.
pros: very good service. Me gusta que los resueltados los he visto. mejoro la clientela
cons: facil de usar me gusta porque yo misma pueod hacer todo lo que necesito rapido y facil
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Te obliga a dejar de hacer otras cosas
description: En cuatro meses no he notado un aumento distinto al que tenía anteriormente, mis acciones mediante mailing u otro tipo de publicidad hacían más mella que esta herramienta. Tenía también el List local essential que para tiendas físicas será genial pero para online no sirve. Al final la gente se acaba decantado por los marketplaces, porque estas herramientas no aseguran nada y los otros sí.
author: Pablo P.
pros: Te informa de cosas que hay que mejorar pero que están en otros similares como Google Ads, y que normalmente no van a ningún lado, en algunos casos te explica como lo tienes que hacer para mejorar y hasta ahí bien.
cons: Necesitas mucho pero que mucho tiempo para mantener esta función actualizada y correcta. No tenemos tiempo para esto, no somos programadores, por muchas facilidades que nos pongan, no lo vamos a hacer mejor que un informático. Será más barata, pero a la larga es una pérdida de dinero, porque el retorno a pesar de haber hecho cosas es cero.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: à fuir, système pas au point !
description: A fuir !!! Au début, c'est pas mal, ça aide à comprendre le fonctionnement du référencement MAIS, rapidement, les conseils sont à éviter ou inutile : -Demande de modification de métatitre aberrantes (mon site est passé de la 20ème place à la 45ème dans la recherche google !) et il en est de même pour d'autres de mes pages si je suis les recommandations -Des "choses à faire" mais qui sont déjà faites (on passe du temps à chercher les modifs à faire mais c'est fait, et quand on valide sur le rankingcoach, sans avoir fait de changement, ça dit que c'est bon !) -des ajouts de mots clefs dans les balises qui sont déjà faites ou qui ne correspondent pas à la page.... bref... Et, pour couronner le tout, une offre d'essai google ads est indiquée sur le site mais elle ne correspond qu'à l'offre google ads, ce n'est pas une offre de Ionos !!!! Je vais les rappeler pour la 3ème fois pour résilier mais, vu mes 2 premiers appels, je devrais certainement passer par une asso de défense des consommateur...
author: Ned C.
pros: Au début, j'ai appris des choses, ça m'a permis de comprendre le fonctionnement des balises, métatitres...
cons: Ensuite les tâches à faire se sont avérées pénalisantes pour le référencement de mon site !
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: ha sido hasta el momento no tengo queja alguna
author: cristina S.
pros: La app 360 es muy intuitiva, las recomendaciones son muy acertadas,los videotutoriales son tan detallados que es fácil hacerlo sin necesidad de conocimientos técnicos.Sin duda la recomendaría.
cons: considero que la debilidad NO es de la herramienta sino en los hábitos de la persona, porque es responsabilidad de cada hacerlos cambios y NO de la herramienta.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Paul H.
pros: Die automatische Verzeichniss Veröffentlichung finde ich gut.
cons: Der Kundenservice von rankingCoach ist absoluter Mist! Ich habe das Tool für meine alte Firma genutzt und nach einem Umbranding mein Konto reaktiviert. Aber es war unmöglich, die Domain zu ändern. Der Kundenservice war absolut nutzlos und konnte mir nicht helfen. Das Schlimmste war, dass meine Firma in Verzeichnissen mit der falschen Domain veröffentlicht wurde und das konnte nicht rückgängig gemacht werden. Ich fühle mich von diesem Service betrogen und verärgert. Der Kundenservice zeigt keinerlei Entgegenkommen und ich habe das Gefühl, mein Geld für nichts ausgegeben zu haben
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Doe het niet. Begin er niet aan.
description: 5 jaar klant geweest. (ik kom er nog niet vanaf). laatste jaren werkt het niet meer maar ze blijven maar geld claimen in plaats van te helpen. Ik kan al maanden niet in het systeem. slechte reviews worden verwijderd. ZE hebben wel een paar hele goede juristen in dienst. maar dat is niet mijn manier van zaken doen.

pros: ik dacht in het begin een makkelijk overzichtelijk systeem te hebben. maar het systeem is verouderd, vernieuwt nauwelijks, klantenservice is niet thuis en ze willen enkel geld innen.
cons: het draait alleen om geld. Geen goed gesprek mogelijk

cons: - Keine Conversion-Messung und somit nicht brauchbar- Geld für Ads zahlen, ohne zu wissen, was man davon hat (Viele Klicks aber keine Neukunden oder messbare Conversions)- Nach 6 Tagen Rückerstattung angefordert ohne das Tool genutzt zu haben - wurde abgelehnt - Getrennt von Google Analytics und somit kein nachhaltiger Ansatz, der funktionieren kann

description: NO HAY VENTAJAS- tengan muchisimo cuidado - no lo aconsejo a nadie
author: Roxana R.
pros: AHORA MISMO NADA! me parece terrible y aconsejo que vayan con mucho cuidado no lo utilicen no vale la pena
cons: Hola, yo la he utilizado y para mi es un timo, no vale para nada su precio, apenas daría un euro por los informes - lo peor es que tiene un sistema de cobro automático, en el que cuando lo cancelas, te da un texto en rojo con unas palabras muy escogidas para que te equivoques y vuelvas a dejar activa el cobro automático, cuando les dije que me queria dar de baja por que se hizo automatico, me dijeron que es imposible. el contrato que tienen es lo peor que hay, está bloqueado por un año y es carisimo. les pedí que me dieran de baja y niegan hacerlo- me cobran un año y segun sus normas no tengo derecho a que se me fraccione el pago ni a dar de baja mi cuenta, les pedí que cancelaran mi cuenta que no quiero usarla y no hay forma , no aceptan hacerlo, increíble que sea así!
